message:
✨ Tighten card-loading compliance assertions after demo badge fix (#1168)

- Add explicit criterion A assertion at 100% (no demo badge during loading)
- Reduce overall fail tolerance from 20 to 2 (only timing edge cases)
- Remove demo badge contamination warning — issue is fixed upstream

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
